title: Health guidance for the travel industry  - Canada.ca
content:
## Health guidance for the travel industry
Travelling Public Program, quarantine services, guidance for marine and cruise ship operators

## Services and information

### Guidance for marine operators: Reporting illness on board
For marine operators entering and exiting Canada about their obligation to report diseases on board their vessels

### Travelling Public Program
Planning of safe food and potable water, and maintenance of appropriate sanitation levels on passenger conveyances

### Public health reference tool for cruise ship operators
Compilation of references to Canadian public health resources on communicable disease prevention
About our collaboration with other government departments to prevent the spread of disease

### Hazard guidance for employers with employees who work abroad
Hazards workers may be exposed to, steps to reduce health, safety and security risks before, during and after travel
- Public Health Agency of Canada
- Canadian Centre for Occupational Health and Safety
